scripts.knowledge:embed: python3 knowledge/embed_chunks.py --chunks knowledge/chunks.json --db-path knowledge/chroma_db --collection justo_knowledge --cache-dir knowledge/.model_cache --reset
scripts.knowledge:embed:download: python3 knowledge/embed_chunks.py --chunks knowledge/chunks.json --db-path knowledge/chroma_db --collection justo_knowledge --cache-dir knowledge/.model_cache --reset --allow-downloads
